style_note: Tile Africa's own name for the UI placeholder 'Natural' - earthy tones, slate and stone-look tiles, wood-look walls, matt black and stainless fittings, freestanding stone baths.
known_gaps: Tile Africa's Naturally Beautiful bathroom sub-listing has no vanities, toilets, tapware, shower heads, mirrors, towel rails or built-in baths - those categories were style-matched from their wider catalogue on 2026-07-10 (wood/oak finishes, matt black and stainless fittings, round mirrors) - same approach as Modern Metro's wall tiles. Prices are real and current; the style pairing is our curation, not Tile Africa's tagging.
Built-in baths come from the general built-in baths category - Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection.

The Abode New Media mixers that Tile Africa lists in this style's own bathroom range are named 'Sink Mixer' (kitchen tapware) - deliberately not used; basin mixers here come from the bathroom taps category instead.
The range's porcelain mosaics are sold per 300x300mm sheet, so they are excluded from per-m2 quoting.
